title: SQL: cast interval to time results in zero time
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, duration INTEGER NOT NULL);
SELECT duration, datetime(duration, 'unixepoch') AS time_value FROM test_intervals;
SELECT id, datetime(duration, 'unixepoch') AS time_value FROM test_intervals WHERE duration IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: casting interval to time returns zero time
